title: WallsNStuff
description: Adds a lot of walls, fences and fence gates for nearly every block!
body:
This mod adds a bunch of walls, fences, and fence gates. all the fence gates use the block that its named after as a recipe, I.E: to make the light blue wool wall you need to put 6 light blue wool in the wall recipe formation.

check the images tab for all the items added

Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d)
